race.comment: PIQUED INTEREST (1) is better than last start when sixth (17.97) from Box 7 at this track over 300m. Has a very good strike-rate from this draw, with two wins from three starts. Has ability and looks hard to stop. SWING BY (2) had a tricky draw and ran well to finish third, beaten 2 lengths, (16.62) at Q Straight. Solid formlines coming through her last run. Must be included in calculations. MISSY'S GIRL (5) produced a modest effort most recently when eighth at this track over 300m behind Frank Chana (18.61) in a Grade 5. Worth following up. AMAZING BUNDY (3) boasts a solid strike-rate over this track and distance. Something for the Multiples: REEL'EM CHAPPO (6)

runners.name: Wow Girl
runners.owners: J Carter J Brown - Mgr J Carter
